notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Throwing error by pitcher Cam Schlittler on the pickoff attempt.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Amed Rosario. Masataka Yoshida scores. Ceddanne Rafaela to 3rd. Willson Contreras to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Nate Eaton pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Red Sox challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Nate Eaton hit by pitch. Caleb Durbin scores. Andruw Monasterio to 3rd. Carlos Narváez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Nate Eaton plunked
notableEvents.detail: Red Sox challenged (hit by pitch), call on the field was overturned: Nate Eaton hit by pitch. Caleb Durbin scores. Andruw Monasterio to 3rd. Carlos Narváez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Amed Rosario. Masataka Yoshida scores. Ceddanne Rafaela to 3rd. Willson Contreras to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Willson Contreras reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by third baseman Amed Rosario. Masataka Yoshida scores. Ceddanne Rafaela to 3rd. Willson Contreras to 2nd. Fielding error by third baseman Amed Rosario.

notableEvents.label: Stolen base
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez challenged (pitch result), call on the field was confirmed: Jazz Chisholm Jr. steals (24) 3rd base.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Narváez hits a sacrifice bunt. Fielding error by pitcher Yerry De los Santos. Caleb Durbin to 3rd. Andruw Monasterio to 2nd. Carlos Narváez to 1st.

notableEvents.label: Max Schuemann pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Max Schuemann flies out to right fielder Wilyer Abreu.
